services.name: WordPress / Elementor Websites
services.description: High-converting, fully customized corporate and landing page designs built using Elementor Pro on WordPress. We develop bespoke themes, optimize load times to sub-second speeds, secure configurations, and set up drag-and-drop custom modules so your internal marketing teams can manage content.
services.focus: Bespoke Theme & Elementor Custom Widgets, Sub-second Mobile Load Speed Optimizations, Security Hardening & Automated Daily Backups

services.name: PHP Custom Websites & Systems
services.description: When standard templates fall short, we build custom applications and MVC backends from scratch using secure, modern PHP (8.x). Optimized for low-cost shared hosting environments, our database architectures use prepared PDO statements to ensure maximum vulnerability protection while executing queries.
services.focus: Custom Database Arch (MySQL/PDO), Secure Admin Dashboards & Middleware Gates, Third-party API & webhook integrations

services.name: SEO and Organic Search Ranking
services.description: Move up Google's search result pages. We execute technical audit reviews, fix crawlability constraints, optimize Core Web Vitals, and deploy schema markups. Followed by meticulous keyword targeting, competitor research, and high-quality backlink generation to position your site where prospects look.
services.focus: Comprehensive Keyword Research & Mapping, Technical SEO audit & Schema markups, High-Quality Domain Authority backlinks

services.name: Digital Marketing & Ads Management
services.description: Stop burning budget on unoptimized ads. We manage performance campaigns on Google Ads, Meta Ads (Facebook/Instagram), and LinkedIn. Our strategies focus on laser-focused audience segmentation, landing page conversion tests, and robust conversion API tracking to ensure positive ROI.
services.focus: Meta Pixels & Conversion API setups, A/B Landing Page split testing, Detailed monthly conversion reports

services.name: Content & 3D AI Product Mockups
services.description: Empowered content creation. We set up easy-to-use Canva templates aligned with your brand style guidelines. Additionally, we use advanced neural rendering pipelines to generate high-fidelity 3D product mockups directly from your flat product photos, providing gorgeous commercial assets.
services.focus: Custom Canva social media template kits, 3D photorealistic product renderings, AI image enhancement & asset prep

services.name: E-commerce Business Startups
services.description: Launch your storefront with peace of mind. We build and structure comprehensive online stores utilizing WooCommerce or Shopify. From configuring inventory syncing, payment gates (bKash/SSLCommerz/Stripe), automated tax calculations, SMS invoice delivery, to shipping partner integrations.
services.focus: WooCommerce & Shopify configuration, Local & International payment gateways, Order management & SMS notification systems

services.name: Business Solutions & Branding
services.description: Establish a solid corporate identity. We engineer modern corporate logos, design stationery assets, write brand style books, and deploy digital workspaces (Google Workspace/Microsoft 365 setup). Our structural solutions streamline your workflow and secure your brand presence.
services.focus: Corporate Logo & Identity systems, Brand Style Book definitions, Professional Google Workspace setup
